title: Moderation update
body: Today’s report review is complete. Two high-severity cases were validated and resolved with permanent bans: spam_wave_42 for posting phishing links across multiple channels, and toxic_runner for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers. A separate high-severity report against core_maintainer was reviewed and determined to be a false positive tied to brigading, so no action was taken against that member. The related reports have been closed. Please keep using the report system in good faith—accurate reporting helps us respond quickly and fairly.
